raw_response:
{
  "to": "Rituraj Shrivastava <rituraj@leewayhertz.com>",
  "subject": "RE: Lead time confirmation needed — three N9020A MXA units for Q3 production",
  "body": "Hi Rituraj,

Thanks for reaching out. We’ve attached your request to the existing Keysight support case for tracking: Case 00001520 (SF Case ID: 500dM00003JOsCTQA1).

For the three N9020A MXA units, the current estimated ship date we have on file is 25-Jul-2026.

On shipping consolidation: we can consolidate the three units to ship together, or ship partials as units become available—please confirm your preference and the Ship-To details to use (the recent draft orders on file do not yet show a Ship-To).

If this is tied to a specific PO, please confirm which one to reference (we see multiple draft POs on file, including PO-LH-Q3-2121 / PO-LH-Q3-1823 / PO-LH-Q3-1817 / PO-LH-Q3-1814 / PO-LH-Q3-3017 / PO-LH-Q3-3014 / LH-2026-0042).

Best regards,
Keysight Sales Operations"
}

parsed.subject: RE: Lead time confirmation needed — three N9020A MXA units for Q3 production
parsed.body:
Hi Rituraj,

Thanks for reaching out. We’ve attached your request to the existing Keysight support case for tracking: Case 00001520 (SF Case ID: 500dM00003JOsCTQA1).

For the three N9020A MXA units, the current estimated ship date we have on file is 25-Jul-2026.

On shipping consolidation: we can consolidate the three units to ship together, or ship partials as units become available—please confirm your preference and the Ship-To details to use (the recent draft orders on file do not yet show a Ship-To).

If this is tied to a specific PO, please confirm which one to reference (we see multiple draft POs on file, including PO-LH-Q3-2121 / PO-LH-Q3-1823 / PO-LH-Q3-1817 / PO-LH-Q3-1814 / PO-LH-Q3-3017 / PO-LH-Q3-3014 / LH-2026-0042).

Best regards,
Keysight Sales Operations
